templates: Hey {first_name}, it's {owner_name} from {business_name}. Saw your enquiry about local service booking. Are you in our service area? Quick call today?
Hi {first_name}, thanks for reaching out about local service booking. When were you hoping to get this done? Got 5 minutes to chat?
{first_name}, {owner_name} here from {business_name}. Re your local service booking enquiry: Looking for a one-off or ongoing? What's a good time?
instant_sms.ps: PS. You can reply STOP anytime and we'll take you off the list. ABN on file, address in our reply email.

instant_email.subject: Re: your local service booking enquiry

drip_sequence.subject: One thing I forgot to ask about your local service booking
drip_sequence.body_seed: When were you hoping to get this done?

drip_sequence.subject: How a Burleigh local got booked, paid, done in 48 hours
drip_sequence.body_seed: Texted back inside an hour, on site the next day, paid same evening.

drip_sequence.subject: Still thinking about local service booking?

drip_sequence.subject: Last note from me
drip_sequence.body_seed: Graceful close. Reply if you'd like me to leave the door open another 30 days.
